chunks.text: Please call Stella. Ask her to bring these things with her from the store.
Six spurns of fresh snow peas, five thick slabs of blue cheese and maybe a snack for her brother Bob.
We also need a small plastic snake and a big toy frog for the kids.
She can scoop these things into three red bags and we will go meet her Wednesday at the train station.

text: Please call Stella. Ask her to bring these things with her from the store. Six spurns of fresh snow peas, five thick slabs of blue cheese and maybe a snack for her brother Bob.
